requirement_topic.en: EMC Requirements — DIGENOR NORDOM Standards (Harmonised with CISPR / IEC)

summary.en: The Dominican Republic's national standards body DIGENOR (Dirección General de Normas y Sistemas de Calidad) publishes NORDOM standards for electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) that are largely harmonised with IEC/CISPR international standards and COPANT (Pan American Standards Commission) regional norms. Wireless and electronic devices sold in the Dominican Republic must comply with applicable NORDOM EMC standards covering radiated and conducted emissions, as well as immunity requirements, consistent with the CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 series (emissions) and CISPR 35 / IEC 55035 series (immunity) for multimedia equipment. EMC compliance is closely linked to the INDOTEL homologación process — accredited laboratory test reports demonstrating NORDOM or equivalent IEC/CISPR compliance are required as part of the INDOTEL technical dossier. The Dominican Republic's participation in CAFTA-DR and COPANT means that NORDOM standards align substantially with both North American (ANSI/FCC) and IEC frameworks, easing documentation pathways for exporters who already hold FCC or CE EMC authorisations.
summary.zh: 多米尼加共和国国家标准机构DIGENOR（规范和质量体系总局）发布的NORDOM标准涵盖电磁兼容性（EMC），大量与IEC/CISPR国际标准及COPANT（泛美标准委员会）区域规范协调。在多米尼加共和国销售的无线电子设备须符合适用的NORDOM EMC标准，包括辐射和传导发射及抗扰度要求，与针对多媒体设备的CISPR 32 / IEC 55032系列（发射）和CISPR 35 / IEC 55035系列（抗扰度）一致。EMC合规与INDOTEL型式认可流程密切相关——INDOTEL技术文件须包含经认可实验室出具的符合NORDOM或等效IEC/CISPR标准的检测报告。多米尼加共和国参与CAFTA-DR和COPANT，NORDOM标准与北美（ANSI/FCC）和IEC框架高度对齐，便利了已持有FCC或CE EMC授权的出口商的文件准备。
summary.zht: 多明尼加共和國國家標準機構DIGENOR（規範和品質體系總局）發布的NORDOM標準涵蓋電磁相容性（EMC），大量與IEC/CISPR國際標準及COPANT（泛美標準委員會）區域規範協調。在多明尼加共和國銷售的無線電子裝置須符合適用的NORDOM EMC標準，包括輻射和傳導發射及抗擾度要求，與針對多媒體裝置的CISPR 32 / IEC 55032系列（發射）和CISPR 35 / IEC 55035系列（抗擾度）一致。EMC合規與INDOTEL型式認可流程密切相關——INDOTEL技術文件須包含經認可實驗室出具的符合NORDOM或等效IEC/CISPR標準的檢測報告。多明尼加共和國參與CAFTA-DR和COPANT，NORDOM標準與北美（ANSI/FCC）和IEC框架高度對齊，便利了已持有FCC或CE EMC授權的出口商的文件準備。

standards_or_laws: DIGENOR (Dirección General de Normas y Sistemas de Calidad) — Dominican Republic national standards body; publishes NORDOM standards harmonised with IEC/CISPR/COPANT
NORDOM EMC standards — Dominican national EMC standards harmonised with CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 (multimedia emissions) and CISPR 35 / IEC 55035 (multimedia immunity)
COPANT (Comisión Panamericana de Normas Técnicas) — Pan American Standards Commission; regional standards harmonisation body whose norms inform NORDOM
Ley 602-77 — Dominican Republic law establishing DIGENOR and the national standards system

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for wireless and electronic devices is governed by GB standards (GB/T 9254 series for information technology equipment emissions, GB/T 17618 for immunity) which are harmonised with CISPR and IEC standards. EMC compliance is verified as part of the mandatory CCC (China Compulsory Certification) process administered by CNCA-designated laboratories. Chinese GB EMC standards and CCC EMC test reports are not directly recognised by DIGENOR or INDOTEL, but the underlying IEC/CISPR technical basis is shared, potentially allowing some test data to be presented as supporting documentation within the INDOTEL homologación dossier subject to INDOTEL acceptance.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电子设备的EMC合规由GB标准（信息技术设备发射GB/T 9254系列、抗扰度GB/T 17618）管辖，与CISPR和IEC标准协调。EMC合规通过CNCA指定实验室作为强制CCC认证流程的一部分进行验证。中国GB EMC标准和CCC EMC检测报告不被DIGENOR或INDOTEL直接认可，但其基础IEC/CISPR技术依据相同，相关检测数据在经INDOTEL接受的前提下，可作为INDOTEL型式认可文件内的支持性文件。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電子裝置的EMC合規由GB標準（資訊技術設備發射GB/T 9254系列、抗擾度GB/T 17618）管轄，與CISPR和IEC標準協調。EMC合規通過CNCA指定實驗室作為強制CCC認證流程的一部分進行驗證。中國GB EMC標準和CCC EMC檢測報告不被DIGENOR或INDOTEL直接認可，但其基礎IEC/CISPR技術依據相同，相關檢測數據在經INDOTEL接受的前提下，可作為INDOTEL型式認可文件內的支持性文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 series — Chinese information technology equipment EMC emissions standard (harmonised with CISPR 22/32)
GB/T 17618 — Chinese information technology equipment EMC immunity standard (harmonised with CISPR 24/35)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — includes EMC testing for consumer electronics under CNCA-designated laboratories

gap.en: Chinese GB EMC standards and CCC EMC test reports are not directly recognised by DIGENOR or INDOTEL. However, because NORDOM EMC standards are harmonised with IEC/CISPR, exporters who already hold FCC or IEC/CISPR-based CE EMC test reports may present those as supporting documentation within the INDOTEL homologación dossier — subject to INDOTEL acceptance on a case-by-case basis. CCC-based EMC test reports may also be presented if issued by an ILAC-accredited laboratory and reference the underlying IEC/CISPR test methods, but INDOTEL acceptance is not guaranteed. Dedicated NORDOM-compliant or IEC/CISPR-compliant EMC testing from an internationally accredited laboratory is the most reliable path. The CAFTA-DR alignment provides general familiarity with North American FCC EMC frameworks among Dominican regulators.
gap.zh: 中国GB EMC标准和CCC EMC检测报告不被DIGENOR或INDOTEL直接认可。但由于NORDOM EMC标准与IEC/CISPR协调，已持有FCC或基于IEC/CISPR的CE EMC检测报告的出口商可将其作为INDOTEL型式认可文件内的支持性文件提交——须视INDOTEL逐案接受为准。若CCC EMC检测报告由ILAC认可实验室出具并引用基础IEC/CISPR测试方法，也可作为支持性文件提交，但不保证INDOTEL接受。来自国际认可实验室的专项符合NORDOM或IEC/CISPR的EMC检测是最可靠的路径。CAFTA-DR对齐使多米尼加监管机构对北美FCC EMC框架具有一定的熟悉度。
gap.zht: 中國GB EMC標準和CCC EMC檢測報告不被DIGENOR或INDOTEL直接認可。但由於NORDOM EMC標準與IEC/CISPR協調，已持有FCC或基於IEC/CISPR的CE EMC檢測報告的出口商可將其作為INDOTEL型式認可文件內的支持性文件提交——須視INDOTEL逐案接受為準。若CCC EMC檢測報告由ILAC認可實驗室出具並引用基礎IEC/CISPR測試方法，也可作為支持性文件提交，但不保證INDOTEL接受。來自國際認可實驗室的專項符合NORDOM或IEC/CISPR的EMC檢測是最可靠的路徑。CAFTA-DR對齊使多明尼加監管機構對北美FCC EMC框架具有一定的熟悉度。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NORDOM/IEC/CISPR-compliant EMC test reports required as part of INDOTEL homologación technical dossier; CCC EMC reports not directly recognised
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 9254 / GB/T 17618 EMC compliance required; verified through CCC process under CNCA

source.publisher: DIGENOR — Dirección General de Normas y Sistemas de Calidad (Dominican Republic)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NORDOM EMC standards harmonised with CISPR/IEC apply to wireless and electronic devices in the Dominican Republic; EMC test reports from internationally accredited laboratories are required within the INDOTEL homologación dossier. Chinese GB/CCC EMC reports are not directly recognised. FCC or CE EMC test data from ILAC-accredited laboratories may assist as supporting documentation subject to INDOTEL case-by-case acceptance. Verify current NORDOM standards, INDOTEL dossier requirements, and accepted laboratory accreditations with a qualified Dominican regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与CISPR/IEC协调的NORDOM EMC标准适用于多米尼加共和国的无线电子设备；INDOTEL型式认可文件须包含来自国际认可实验室的EMC检测报告。中国GB/CCC EMC报告不被直接认可。来自ILAC认可实验室的FCC或CE EMC检测数据在经INDOTEL逐案接受的前提下可作为支持性文件。进入市场前请向合格的多米尼加监管专业人士核验现行NORDOM标准、INDOTEL文件要求和认可的实验室资质。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與CISPR/IEC協調的NORDOM EMC標準適用於多明尼加共和國的無線電子裝置；INDOTEL型式認可文件須包含來自國際認可實驗室的EMC檢測報告。中國GB/CCC EMC報告不被直接認可。來自ILAC認可實驗室的FCC或CE EMC檢測數據在經INDOTEL逐案接受的前提下可作為支持性文件。進入市場前請向合格的多明尼加監管專業人士核驗現行NORDOM標準、INDOTEL文件要求和認可的實驗室資質。

requirement_topic.en: DIGENOR NORDOM Product Standards and Conformity Assessment — Electrical and Electronic Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: DIGENOR NORDOM产品标准与合格评定——电气电子设备
requirement_topic.zht: DIGENOR NORDOM產品標準與合格評定——電氣電子設備

summary.en: Beyond EMC, DIGENOR publishes NORDOM product standards covering performance, safety, and quality requirements for electrical and electronic equipment sold in the Dominican Republic, including wireless and IoT devices. NORDOM standards are developed in alignment with IEC, ISO, and COPANT regional norms, and the Dominican Republic participates in COPANT standard harmonisation across the Americas. While the NORDOM certification mark is not always a statutory prerequisite at the product level for every wireless device category (unlike INDOTEL homologación for radio/telecom equipment), manufacturers and importers may be required to demonstrate conformity with applicable NORDOM standards as part of Dominican customs procedures or as referenced within INDOTEL technical dossier requirements. Spanish-language labelling referencing applicable standards or certifications is required. DIGENOR coordinates with INDOTEL on product conformity across the telecommunications and electronics sectors.
summary.zh: 除EMC外，DIGENOR还发布涵盖在多米尼加共和国销售的电气电子设备（包括无线和物联网设备）性能、安全和质量要求的NORDOM产品标准。NORDOM标准与IEC、ISO及COPANT区域规范对齐开发，多米尼加共和国参与COPANT在美洲的标准协调。对于每个无线设备类别，NORDOM认证标志在产品层面并非总是法定前提条件（不同于无线电/电信设备的INDOTEL强制型式认可），但制造商和进口商可能需要在多米尼加海关程序或INDOTEL技术文件要求中证明符合适用的NORDOM标准。须使用引用适用标准或认证的西班牙语标签。DIGENOR在电信和电子行业产品合格评定方面与INDOTEL协调配合。
summary.zht: 除EMC外，DIGENOR還發布涵蓋在多明尼加共和國銷售的電氣電子裝置（包括無線和物聯網裝置）性能、安全和品質要求的NORDOM產品標準。NORDOM標準與IEC、ISO及COPANT區域規範對齊開發，多明尼加共和國參與COPANT在美洲的標準協調。對於每個無線裝置類別，NORDOM認證標誌在產品層面並非總是法定前提條件（不同於無線電/電信裝置的INDOTEL強制型式認可），但製造商和進口商可能需要在多明尼加海關程序或INDOTEL技術文件要求中證明符合適用的NORDOM標準。須使用引用適用標準或認證的西班牙語標籤。DIGENOR在電信和電子行業產品合格評定方面與INDOTEL協調配合。

standards_or_laws: DIGENOR (Dirección General de Normas y Sistemas de Calidad) — Dominican Republic national standards and quality system authority; publishes and administers NORDOM standards
NORDOM product standards — Dominican national product standards for electrical and electronic equipment, harmonised with IEC/ISO/COPANT
COPANT (Comisión Panamericana de Normas Técnicas) — Pan American Standards Commission; regional harmonisation of technical standards across Latin America and Caribbean
Ley 602-77 — establishes DIGENOR mandate and Dominican national standardisation framework

summary.en: In China, product standards for electrical and electronic equipment are published by SAC (Standardization Administration of China) as GB (Guobiao) national standards, covering safety, performance, and quality. GB standards for consumer electronics and wireless devices are administered by MIIT and CNCA; compliance is verified through the CCC certification process. China's GB standards are developed within ISO/IEC frameworks and SRRC/MIIT supplementary requirements. Chinese GB product standards are not recognised as NORDOM equivalents by DIGENOR, and CCC conformity marks carry no weight in Dominican customs or product approval processes.
summary.zh: 在中国，电气电子设备的产品标准由国家标准化管理委员会（SAC）以GB（国标）国家标准形式发布，涵盖安全、性能和质量。消费电子和无线设备GB标准由工信部（MIIT）和国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理；合规通过CCC认证流程验证。中国GB标准在ISO/IEC框架及SRRC/MIIT补充要求体系内开发。中国GB产品标准不被DIGENOR认可为NORDOM等效标准，CCC合格标志在多米尼加海关或产品批准流程中不具效力。
summary.zht: 在中國，電氣電子裝置的產品標準由國家標準化管理委員會（SAC）以GB（國標）國家標準形式發布，涵蓋安全、性能和品質。消費電子和無線裝置GB標準由工信部（MIIT）和國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理；合規通過CCC認證流程驗證。中國GB標準在ISO/IEC框架及SRRC/MIIT補充要求體系內開發。中國GB產品標準不被DIGENOR認可為NORDOM等效標準，CCC合格標誌在多明尼加海關或產品批准流程中不具效力。

standards_or_laws: SAC (Standardization Administration of China) — publishes GB national standards for electrical and electronic products
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory conformity mark for consumer electronics and wireless devices in China under CNCA
GB standards series — Chinese national product standards for electrical/electronic equipment, aligned with IEC/ISO frameworks

gap.en: Chinese GB product standards and the CCC conformity mark are not recognised by DIGENOR as NORDOM equivalents. Importers must be prepared to demonstrate compliance with applicable NORDOM standards — or reference IEC/ISO standards upon which NORDOM is based — as part of Dominican customs declarations or INDOTEL technical dossiers. Because NORDOM is closely aligned with IEC/ISO, exporters with IEC/ISO or CE certifications may present those as supporting documentation, but formal NORDOM conformity assessment or DIGENOR recognition is recommended for high-volume imports. Spanish labelling referencing applicable standards is required. The CAFTA-DR trade framework facilitates customs procedures but does not automatically waive product standards compliance.
gap.zh: 中国GB产品标准和CCC合格标志不被DIGENOR认可为NORDOM等效标准。进口商须准备在多米尼加海关申报或INDOTEL技术文件中证明符合适用NORDOM标准——或引用NORDOM所依据的IEC/ISO标准。由于NORDOM与IEC/ISO高度对齐，持有IEC/ISO或CE认证的出口商可将其作为支持性文件提交，但对于大批量进口，建议进行正式NORDOM合格评定或取得DIGENOR认可。须提供引用适用标准的西班牙语标签。CAFTA-DR贸易框架便利海关程序，但不自动豁免产品标准合规要求。
gap.zht: 中國GB產品標準和CCC合格標誌不被DIGENOR認可為NORDOM等效標準。進口商須準備在多明尼加海關申報或INDOTEL技術文件中證明符合適用NORDOM標準——或引用NORDOM所依據的IEC/ISO標準。由於NORDOM與IEC/ISO高度對齊，持有IEC/ISO或CE認證的出口商可將其作為支持性文件提交，但對於大批量進口，建議進行正式NORDOM合格評定或取得DIGENOR認可。須提供引用適用標準的西班牙語標籤。CAFTA-DR貿易框架便利海關程序，但不自動豁免產品標準合規要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — NORDOM product standards compliance may be required in Dominican customs or INDOTEL dossier contexts; NORDOM certification mark not always a statutory prerequisite for every wireless device category but compliance with applicable standards is expected; CCC not recognised
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB national product standards and CCC conformity mark required for consumer electronics and wireless devices in China under CNCA

source.publisher: DIGENOR — Dirección General de Normas y Sistemas de Calidad (Dominican Republic)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DIGENOR NORDOM product standards — harmonised with IEC/ISO/COPANT — apply to electrical and electronic equipment in the Dominican Republic. Chinese GB product standards and CCC marks are not recognised. IEC/ISO or CE certification may assist as supporting documentation given the IEC/ISO basis of NORDOM, but formal NORDOM conformity assessment is recommended for high-volume imports. Spanish labelling referencing applicable standards is required. Verify current NORDOM requirements for your specific wireless device category with DIGENOR and a qualified Dominican regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] DIGENOR NORDOM产品标准（与IEC/ISO/COPANT协调）适用于多米尼加共和国的电气电子设备。中国GB产品标准和CCC标志不被承认。鉴于NORDOM基于IEC/ISO，IEC/ISO或CE认证可作为支持性文件，但对于大批量进口，建议进行正式NORDOM合格评定。须提供引用适用标准的西班牙语标签。进入市场前请向DIGENOR及合格的多米尼加监管专业人士核验您具体无线设备类别的现行NORDOM要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] DIGENOR NORDOM產品標準（與IEC/ISO/COPANT協調）適用於多明尼加共和國的電氣電子裝置。中國GB產品標準和CCC標誌不被承認。鑑於NORDOM基於IEC/ISO，IEC/ISO或CE認證可作為支持性文件，但對於大批量進口，建議進行正式NORDOM合格評定。須提供引用適用標準的西班牙語標籤。進入市場前請向DIGENOR及合格的多明尼加監管專業人士核驗您具體無線裝置類別的現行NORDOM要求。
